title: HOUSING STABILIZATION SERVICES - 211info
text: OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION CURRY HOUSING STABILIZATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers coordinated entry services for housing. Assistance may include help with rent deposits, rental assistance, or eviction prevention. Households may receive one-time assistance within a 12-month period. Assistance depends on eligibility, funding, and program requirements. 937 Chetco Avenue Suite D Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: To be considered, households must generally: Meet income eligibility requirements. Income limits vary by funding source and are usually based on Area Median Income (AMI). Be experiencing a housing crisis, such as: being homeless OR being at risk of homelessness (for example, an eviction notice) OR actively fleeing domestic violence, dating violence, sexual assault, or stalking. (Documentation is required.) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or walk in to complete a Housing Stabilization Services Application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed Housing Stabilization Services Application and required documents, which may include: -Proof of income or no income -Lease, eviction notice, or landlord verification -Identification and household information -Other documents required by specific funding programs LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Housing Related Coordinated Entry Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDNET HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION CURRY
